Welcome back, ${user.user.username}!`,\n                    'Sync Now',\n                    'View Status'\n                ).then(selection => {\n                    if (selection === 'Sync Now') {\n                        vscode.commands.executeCommand('chatHistory.cloudSync');\n                    } else if (selection === 'View Status') {\n                        vscode.commands.executeCommand('chatHistory.showCloudStatus');\n                    }\n                });\n            } catch (error) {\n                const errorMsg = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n                vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`Login failed: ${errorMsg}`);\n            }\n        }\n\n        // 清理 state\n        await this.context.globalState.update(CloudSyncManager.STATE_KEY, undefined);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Get server URL from configuration\n     * Uses official server by default, or custom URL in debug mode\n     */\n    private getServerUrl(): string {\n        const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n        const debugMode = config.get<boolean>('cloudSync.debugMode',  * Check if cloud sync is enabled\n     */\n    isEnabled(): boolean {\n        const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n        return config.get<boolean>('cloudSync.enabled', false);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Check if auto sync is enabled\n     */\n    isAutoSyncEnabled(): boolean {\n        const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n        return config.get<boolean>('cloudSync.autoSync', true);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Update status bar based on login state\n     */\n    updateStatusBar(): void {\n        const user = this.getUser();\n        if (user) {\n            this.statusBarItem.text = `LLM Chat: $(cloud) ${user.username}`;\n            this.statusBarItem.tooltip = this.t('cloud.statusBarLoggedIn', { username: user.username });\n            this.statusBarItem.command = 'chatHistory.cloudLogin';\n        } else {\n            this.statusBarItem.text = 'LLM Chat: $(cloud-offline)';\n            this.statusBarItem.tooltip = this.t('cloud.statusBarNotLoggedIn');\n            this.statusBarItem.command =    }\n        if (accountProvider) {\n            accountProvider.refresh();\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Check if user is logged in\n     */\n    isLoggedIn(): boolean {\n        return !!this.getToken() && !!this.getUser();\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Make HTTP request\n     * 支持滑动过期：自动检测并更新服务器返回的新 token\n     */\n    private async request<T>(\n        method: string,\n        path:    if (token) {\n            headers['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${token}`;\n        }\n\n        const requestBody = body ?                    port: url.port || (isHttps ? 443 : 80),\n                    path: url.pathname + url.search,\n                    method,\n                    headers,\n                },\n                (res) => {\n                    let data = '';\n                    res.on('data', (chunk) => (data += chunk));\n                    res.on('end', async () => {\n                        try {\n                            // 检查是否有新 token（滑动过期机制）\n                            const newToken = res.headers['x-new-token'];\n                            if (newToken && typeof newToken === 'string') {\n                                console.log('[CloudSync] Token refreshed by server (sliding expiration)');\n                                // 更新存储的 token\n                                await this.context.globalState.update(CloudSyncManager.TOKEN_KEY, newToken);\n                            }\n\n                            const json = JSON.parse(data);\n                            if (res.statusCode && res.statusCode >= 200 && res.statusCode < 300) {\n                                resolve(json as T);\n                            } else {\n                                reject(new Error(json.error || `Request failed with status ${res.statusCode}`));\n                            }\n                        } catch (e) {\n                            reject(new Error('Failed to parse response'));\n                        }\n                    });\n                }\n            );\n\n            req.on('error', reject);\n\n            if (requestBody) {\n                req.write(requestBody);\n            }\n            req.end();\n        });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Login via browser (OAuth flow)\n     */\n    async loginWithBrowser(mode: 'login' | 'register' = 'login'): Promise<void> {\n        const serverUrl = this.getServerUrl();\n        \n        // 生成随机 state 防止 CSRF\n        const state = crypto.randomBytes(32).toString('hex');\n        await this.context.globalState.update(CloudSyncManager.STATE_KEY, state);\n\n        // 构建回调 URI\n        const callbackUri = vscode.env.openExternal(vscode.Uri.parse(authUrl));\n        \n        // 显示等待提示\n        vscode.window.showInformationMessage(\n            'Please complete the authentication in your browser.',\n            'Cancel'\n        );\n    }\n\n\n    /**\n     * Logout from cloud\n     */\n    async logout(): Promise<void> {\n        const token = this.getToken();\n        const user = this.getUser();\n sessions: SyncSession[]): Promise<void> {\n        const token = this.getToken();\n        if (!token) {\n            throw new Error('Not logged in');\n        }\n\n        if (sessions.length === 0) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        const syncRequest: SyncRequest = {\n            source,\n            sessions,\n        };\n\n        await this.request<{ message: string }>('POST', '/api/chat/sync', syncRequest, token);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Convert Message array to SyncMessage array\n     */\n    convertMessages(messages: Message[]): SyncMessage[] {\n        return messages.map((msg) => ({\n            type: msg.type,\n            content: msg.text,\n            thinking: msg.thinking,\n            timestamp: msg.timestamp,\n            model_name: ## 🤖 Assistant #9 (Agent)

_2025-12-26 06:16Z_

我找到原因了！

问题在于你的 VS Code/Cursor 设置中 `chatHistory.cloudSync.debugMode` 可能被设置为 `true`。

看代码逻辑（`cloud-sync.ts`）：

```138:151:D:\Projects\llm_chat_history\src\cloud\cloud-sync.ts
    private getServerUrl(): string {
        const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');
        const debugMode = config.get<boolean>('cloudSync.debugMode', false);
        
        if (debugMode) {
            const debugUrl = config.get<string>('cloudSync.debugServerUrl', '');
            if (debugUrl) {
                console.log('[CloudSync] Debug mode enabled, using custom server:', debugUrl);
                return debugUrl;
            }
        }
        
        return CloudSyncManager.OFFICIAL_SERVER_URL;
    }
```

逻辑是：
- **Debug Mode 开启** → 使用 `debugServerUrl`（默认值是 `http://192.168.56.101:9999`）
- **Debug Mode 关闭** → 使用官方服务器 `https://llm-chat-history.com`

**解决方法：**

在你的 Cursor/VS Code 中检查并关闭 debug 模式：

1. 打开设置 (Ctrl+,)
2. 搜索 `chatHistory.cloudSync.debugMode`
3. 确保它是 **关闭/false** 状态

或者在 `settings.json` 中添加/修改：
```json
{
    "chatHistory.cloudSync.debugMode": false
}
```

另外，`package.json` 中 `debugServerUrl` 的默认值也是这个本地地址，但只要 `debugMode` 是 `false`，它就不会被使用。

## 🤖 Assistant #12 (Agent)

_2025-12-26 06:20Z_

根据 `package.json` 中的配置：

```115:119:D:\Projects\llm_chat_history\package.json
        "chatHistory.cloudSync.debugMode": {
          "type": "boolean",
          "default": false,
          "description": "Enable debug mode to use custom server URL (for development only)"
        },
```

**默认值是 `false`（关闭的）**。

所以新用户安装后，理论上应该自动使用官方服务器 `https://llm-chat-history.com`。

如果你看到的登录地址是 `http://192.168.56.101:9999`，可能的原因是：

1. **你自己的设置被改过** - 之前开发测试时手动开启了 debugMode
2. **工作区设置覆盖** - 检查当前工作区的 `.vscode/settings.json` 是否有覆盖

你可以运行这个命令来检查当前实际生效的设置：

1. 在 Cursor 中按 `Ctrl+Shift+P`
2. 输入 `Preferences: Open Settings (JSON)`
3. 搜索 `debugMode` 看看有没有设置为 `true`

或者直接在设置界面搜索 `chatHistory.cloudSync.debugMode`，看看当前值是什么。

'active' : ''}\" \n                 data-id=\"${session.id}\" onclick=\"selectSession('${session.id}')\">\n                <div class=\"session-title\" title=\"${escapeHtml(session.title)}\">${escapeHtml(session.title)}</div>\n                <div class=\"session-meta\">\n                    <span><i class=\"fas fa-hourglass-half\"></i> ${durationStr || '--'}</span>\n                    <span><i class=\"fas fa-clock\"></i> ${dateStr} ${timeStr}</span>\n                </div>\n                <div class=\"session-meta\">\n                    <span><i class=\"fas fa-comment\"></i> ${session.message_count}</span>\n                    <span><i class=\"fas fa-cube\"></i> ${session.source}</span>\n                </div>\n            </div>\n        `;\n    }).join('');\n}\n\n// ========== 分页渲染 ==========\nfunction renderPagination() {\n    const container = document.getElementById('paginationFooter');\n    if (totalPages <= 1) {\n        container.innerHTML = '';\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    let html = '';\n    if (currentPage > 1) html += `<button class=\"page-btn\" onclick=\"loadSessions(${currentPage - 1})\">‹</button>`;\n    \n    for (let i = Math.max(1, currentPage - 2); i <= Math.min(totalPages, currentPage + 2); i++) {\n        html += `<button class=\"page-btn ${i === currentPage ? lines.forEach(line => {\r\n        if (line.startsWith('# ')) {\r\n            if (currentSection) {\r\n                sections.push({ title: currentSection, content: currentContent.join('\\n') 1})\">›</button>`;\n    \n    container.innerHTML = html;\n}\n\n// ========== 加载会话列表 ==========\nasync function loadSessions(page = 1, autoSelectFirst = false) {\n    try {\n        const params = {  \n        const response = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/chat/sessions`, { params });\n        // 确保 sessions 是数组，防止后端返回 null\n        sessions = response.data.sessions || [];\n        currentPage = 0.35rem;\n    border: 1px solid transparent;\n}\n\n.session-item:hover {\n    background: var(--bg-secondary);\n}\n\n.session-item.active {\n    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.15) 0%, rgba(118, 75, 162, 0.15) 100%);\n    border-color: rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.4);\n}\n\n.session-title {\n    font-weight: 600;\n    font-size: 0.9rem;\n    color: var(--text-primary);\n    margin-bottom: 0.25rem;\n    white-space: nowrap;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    text-overflow: ellipsis;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n}\n\n.session-item.active .session-title {\n    white-space: normal;\n    overflow: visible;\n    text-overflow: unset;\n    line-height: 1.4;\n}\n\n.session-meta {\n    font-size: 0.7rem;\n    color: var(--text-muted);\n    display: flex;\n    gap: 0.5rem;\n    flex-wrap: wrap;\n}\n\n.session-meta span {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.2rem;\n}\n\n.main-layout.has-selection .session-meta {\n    flex-direction: column;\n    gap: 0.15rem;\n}\n\n/* ========== 中间时间线面板 ========== */\n.timeline-panel {\n    width: 0;\n    min-width: 0;\n    background: var(--timeline-bg);\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    opacity: 0;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n    border-radius: 0;\n    box-shadow: var(--shadow);\n}\n\n.main-layout.has-selection .timeline-panel {\n    width: 300px;\n    min-width: 300px;\n    opacity: 1;\n}\n\n.main-layout.has-selection.user-filter-active .timeline-panel {\n    width: 400px;\n    min-width: 400px;\n}\n\n.timeline-header {\n    padding: 0.75rem 1rem;\n    background: var(--timeline-border);\n    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--timeline-border);\n    color: var(--timeline-text);\n    flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n.timeline-title-row {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: space-between;\n    margin-bottom: 0.35rem;\n}\n\n.timeline-title {\n    font-weight: 600;\n    font-size: 0.85rem;\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.5rem;\n    color: var(--timeline-text);\n}\n\n.timeline-duration {\n    font-size: 0.65rem;\n    color: var(--timeline-text-muted);\n    background: var(--timeline-border);\n    padding: 0.15rem 0.4rem;\n    border-radius: 8px;\n}\n\n.timeline-time-range {\n    font-size: 0.6rem;\n    color: var(--timeline-text-muted);\n    margin-bottom: 0.4rem;\n}\n\n.timeline-stats {\n    display: flex;\n    gap: 0.4rem;\n    flex-wrap: wrap;\n}\n\n.stat-item {\n    font-size: 0.6rem;\n    padding: 0.12rem 0.4rem;\n    border-radius: 10px;\n    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);\n    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8);\n    transition: all 0.2s;\n    user-select: none;\n}\n\n.stat-item.active {\n    opacity: 1;\n}\n\n.stat-item.user { \n    background: rgba(79, 172, 254, 0.3); \n    cursor: pointer;\n}\n\n.stat-item.user:hover {\n    transform: scale(1.05);\n    background: rgba(79, 172, 254, 0.5);\n}\n\n.stat-item.user.filtering {\n    background: rgba(79, 172, 254, 0.7);\n    box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(79, 172, 254, 0.5);\n}\n\n.stat-item.assistant { background: rgba(67, 233, 123, 0.3); }\n.stat-item.tools { background: rgba(255, 159, 67, 0.3); }\n.stat-item.tool-result { background: rgba(250, 112, 154, 0.3); }\n\n.timeline-list {\n    flex: 1;\n    overflow-y: auto;\n    padding: 0.5rem;\n}\n\n.timeline-list::-webkit-scrollbar {\n    width: 5px;\n}\n.timeline-list::-webkit-scrollbar-track {\n    background: transparent;\n}\n.timeline-list::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {\n    background: var(--timeline-node-line);\n    border-radius: 3px;\n}\n\n/* ========== 时间线节点 ========== */\n.timeline-node {\n    position: relative;\n    padding: 0.5rem 0.5rem 0.5rem 1.8rem;\n    margin-bottom: 0.3rem;\n    border-radius: 6px;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    transition: all 0.2s;\n    background: transparent;\n    border: 1px solid transparent;\n}\n\n.timeline-node:hover {\n    background: var(--timeline-border);\n}\n\n.timeline-node.user-node {\n    background: var(--user-node-bg);\n    border-left: 3px solid var(--user-node-border);\n}\n\n.timeline-node.user-node:hover {\n    background: rgba(79, 172, 254, 0.2);\n}\n\n.timeline-node.user-node.active {\n    background: rgba(79, 172, 254, 0.25);\n    border-color: var(--user-node-border);\n    box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px var(--user-node-border);\n}\n\n.timeline-node.assistant-node {\n    background: var(--assistant-node-bg);\n    border-left: 3px solid var(--assistant-node-border);\n}\n\n.timeline-node.assistant-node:hover {\n    background: rgba(67, 233, 123, 0.12);\n}\n\n.timeline-node.assistant-node.active {\n    background: rgba(67, 233, 123, 0.15);\n    border-color: var(--assistant-node-border);\n    box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px var(--assistant-node-border);\n}\n\n.timeline-node.context-node {\n    opacity: 0.85;\n    border-left-style: dashed;\n    margin-left: 0.5rem;\n    animation: slideIn 0.3s ease;\n}\n\n@keyframes slideIn {\n    from {\n        opacity: 0;\n        transform: translateX(-10px);\n    }\n    to {\n        opacity: 0.85;\n        transform: translateX(0);\n    }\n}\n\n.context-label {\n    font-size: 0.55rem;\n    color: var(--timeline-text-muted);\n    text-transform: uppercase;\n    letter-spacing: 0.5px;\n    margin-bottom: 0.25rem;\n    padding-left: 0.2rem;\n}\n\n.timeline-node::before {\n    content: '';\n    position: absolute;\n    left: 0.6rem;\n    top: 0;\n    bottom: 0;\n    width: 2px;\n    background: var(--timeline-node-line);\n}\n\n.timeline-node:first-child::before { top: 50%; }\n.timeline-node:last-child::before { bottom: 50%; }\n\n.timeline-node::after {\n    content: '';\n    position: absolute;\n    left: 0.35rem;\n    top: 1rem;\n    width: 7px;\n    height: 7px;\n    border-radius: 50%;\n    background: #667eea;\n    border: 2px solid var(--bg-card);\n    z-index: 1;\n}\n\n.timeline-node.user-node::after { background: #4facfe; }\n.timeline-node.assistant-node::after { background: #43e97b; }\n\n.node-header {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: flex-start;\n    gap: 0.35rem;\n}\n\n.node-icon { font-size: 0.8rem; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 0.1rem; }\n\n.node-preview {\n    flex: 1;\n    font-size: 0.75rem;\n    line-height: 1.4;\n    display: -webkit-box;\n    -webkit-line-clamp: 2;\n    -webkit-box-orient: vertical;\n    overflow: hidden;\n}\n\n.timeline-node.user-node .node-preview {\n    color: var(--user-node-text);\n}\n\n.timeline-node.assistant-node .node-preview {\n    color: var(--assistant-node-text);\n}\n\n.user-filter-active .timeline-node.user-node .node-preview {\n    -webkit-line-clamp: unset;\n    display: block;\n}\n\n/* ========== Dive 图标（用户消息统计可点击提示） ========== */\n.stat-item.user {\n    display: inline-flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.25rem;\n}\n\n.dive-indicator {\n    display: inline-flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.15rem;\n    font-size: 0.5rem;\n    opacity: 0.6;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n}\n\n.dive-indicator .dive-icon {\n    font-size: 0.6rem;\n    animation: divePulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;\n}\n\n.dive-indicator .dive-text {\n    display: none;\n    font-weight: 500;\n    font-size: 0.5rem;\n}\n\n/* Hover 效果 */\n.stat-item.user:hover .dive-indicator {\n    opacity: 1;\n}\n\n.stat-item.user:hover .dive-indicator .dive-text {\n    display: inline;\n}\n\n/* 激活状态（只看用户消息模式）下更明显 */\n.stat-item.user.filtering .dive-indicator {\n    opacity: 1;\n}\n\n.stat-item.user.filtering .dive-indicator .dive-icon {\n    animation: divePulseStrong 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;\n}\n\n.stat-item.user.filtering .dive-indicator .dive-text {\n    display: inline;\n}\n\n/* 脉冲动画 - 轻微 */\n@keyframes divePulse {\n    0%, 100% {\n        transform: translateY(0);\n        opacity: 0.6;\n    }\n    50% {\n        transform: translateY(1px);\n        opacity: 1;\n    }\n}\n\n/* 脉冲动画 - 明显（过滤模式） */\n@keyframes divePulseStrong {\n    0%, 100% {\n        transform: translateY(0) scale(1);\n    }\n    50% {\n        transform: translateY(2px) scale(1.15);\n    }\n}\n\n.node-meta {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.3rem;\n    flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n.node-time {\n    color: var(--timeline-text-muted);\n    font-size: 0.55rem;\n}\n\n.node-count-badge {\n    background: var(--timeline-border);\n    padding: 0.08rem 0.3rem;\n    border-radius: 6px;\n    font-size: 0.55rem;\n    color: var(--timeline-text-muted);\n}\n\n.node-sub-items {\n    margin-top: 0.25rem;\n    padding-left: 0.15rem;\n}\n\n.node-sub-item {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.25rem;\n    font-size: 0.6rem;\n    color: var(--timeline-text-muted);\n    padding: 0.08rem 0;\n}\n\n/* AI 节点统计样式 */\n.node-stats-container {\n    flex: 1;\n    min-width: 0;\n}\n\n.node-stats-row {\n    display: flex;\n    gap: 0.3rem;\n    flex-wrap: wrap;\n}\n\n.node-stat-badge {\n    font-size: 0.6rem;\n    padding: 0.15rem 0.35rem;\n    border-radius: 8px;\n    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);\n    color: var(--timeline-text);\n    line-height: 1;\n    display: inline-flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    height: 1.2rem;\n}\n\n.node-stat-badge.msg { background: rgba(67, 233, 123, 0.25); }\n.node-stat-badge.thinking { \n    background: rgba(79, 172, 254, 0.25); \n    /* 覆盖 base.html 中全局 .thinking 的样式 */\n    font-style: normal;\n    color: var(--timeline-text);\n    margin-top: 0;\n}\n.node-stat-badge.tool { background: rgba(255, 159, 67, 0.25); }\n\n.node-duration {\n    font-size: 0.55rem;\n    color: var(--timeline-text-muted);\n    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);\n    padding: 0.1rem 0.3rem;\n    border-radius: 6px;\n    margin-right: 0.2rem;\n}\n\n.node-tools-detail {\n    display: flex;\n    flex-wrap: wrap;\n    gap: 0.2rem;\n    margin-top: 0.3rem;\n    padding-left: 1.5rem;\n}\n\n.tool-tag {\n    font-size: 0.55rem;\n    padding: 0.08rem 0.3rem;\n    border-radius: 4px;\n    background: rgba(255, 159, 67, 0.15);\n    color: var(--timeline-text-muted);\n    border: 1px solid rgba(255, 159, 67, 0.3);\n}\n\n.tool-tag.more {\n    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);\n    border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.2);\n}\n\n/* ========== 右侧详情面板 ========== */\n.detail-panel {\n    flex: 1;\n    background: var(--bg-card);\n    border-radius: 0 12px 12px 0;\n    box-shadow: var(--shadow);\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    opacity: 0;\n    width: 0;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n}\n\n.main-layout.has-selection .detail-panel {\n    opacity: 1;\n    width: auto;\n    flex: 1;\n}\n\n.detail-header {\n    padding: 0.75rem 1.25rem;\n    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);\n    color: #fff;\n    flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n.detail-header-top {\n    display: flex;\n    justify-content: space-between;\n    align-items: center;\n}\n\n.detail-header-left {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.6rem;\n}\n\n.detail-type-icon { font-size: 1.2rem; }\n\n.detail-info h3 {\n    margin: 0;\n    font-size: 0.9rem;\n    font-weight: 600;\n}\n\n.detail-meta {\n    font-size: 0.65rem;\n    opacity: 0.85;\n    margin-top: 0.05rem;\n}\n\n.detail-header-right {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.5rem;\n}\n\n.expand-mode-toggle {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.3rem;\n    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15);\n    padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem;\n    border-radius: 15px;\n}\n\n.mode-btn {\n    padding: 0.2rem 0.5rem;\n    border: none;\n    background: transparent;\n    border-radius: 10px;\n    font-size: 0.65rem;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);\n    transition: all 0.2s;\n}\n\n.mode-btn.active {\n    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.25);\n    color: #fff;\n}\n\n.expand-all-btn {\n    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2);\n    border: none;\n    color: #fff;\n    padding: 0.3rem 0.6rem;\n    border-radius: 12px;\n    font-size: 0.7rem;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.25rem;\n}\n\n.expand-all-btn:hover {\n    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.3);\n}\n\n.detail-summary {\n    display: flex;\n    gap: 0.4rem;\n    margin-top: 0.4rem;\n    flex-wrap: wrap;\n}\n\n.summary-badge {\n    font-size: 0.6rem;\n    padding: 0.15rem 0.4rem;\n    border-radius: 8px;\n    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2);\n    color: #fff;\n}\n\n.detail-body {\n    flex: 1;\n    overflow-y: auto;\n    padding: 0.75rem;\n}\n\n.detail-body::-webkit-scrollbar {\n    width: 6px;\n}\n.detail-body::-webkit-scrollbar-track {\n    background: var(--bg-secondary);\n}\n.detail-body::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {\n    background: var(--text-muted);\n    border-radius: 3px;\n}\n\n.sessions-list::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {\n    background: var(--border-color);\n}\n\n/* ========== 卡片样式 ========== */\n.item-card {\n    border: 1px solid var(--border-color);\n    border-radius: 8px;\n    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    background: var(--bg-card);\n}\n\n.item-card:hover {\n    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);\n}\n\n.item-card-header {\n    padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;\n    background: var(--bg-secondary);\n    cursor: pointer;\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.5rem;\n}\n\n.item-card-header:hover {\n    background: var(--border-color);\n}\n\n.item-card-icon {\n    width: 26px;\n    height: 26px;\n    border-radius: 6px;\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: center;\n    font-size: 0.8rem;\n}\n\n.item-card-icon.message { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); }\n.item-card-icon.tool { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f093fb 0%, #f5576c 100%); }\n.item-card-icon.thinking { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4facfe 0%, #00f2fe 100%); }\n.item-card-icon.tool-result { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fa709a 0%, #fee140 100%); }\n\n.item-card-title { flex: 1; }\n.item-card-title .title-main { font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--text-primary); }\n.item-card-title .title-sub { font-size: 0.6rem; color: var(--text-muted); }\n\n.item-card-toggle {\n    color: var(--text-muted);\n    font-size: 0.7rem;\n    transition: transform 0.3s;\n}\n\n.item-card-header.collapsed .item-card-toggle {\n    transform: rotate(-90deg);\n}\n\n.item-card-body {\n    padding: 0.75rem;\n    border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);\n    background: var(--bg-card);\n}\n\n.item-card-body.collapsed {\n    display: none;\n}\n\n.hover-expand .item-card-body { display: none; }\n.hover-expand .item-card:hover .item-card-body { display: block; }\n.hover-expand .item-card-toggle { display: none; }\n\n.content-text {\n    line-height: 1.6;\n    color: var(--text-primary);\n    white-space: pre-wrap;\n    word-break: break-word;\n    font-size: 0.8rem;\n}\n\n.tool-code {\n    background: #1e1e1e;\n    color: #d4d4d4;\n    padding: 0.75rem;\n    border-radius: 6px;\n    font-family: 'Consolas', monospace;\n    font-size: 0.7rem;\n    max-height: 250px;\n    overflow: auto;\n    white-space: pre-wrap;\n    word-break: break-word;\n}\n\n.tool-code::-webkit-scrollbar {\n    width: 5px;\n    height: 5px;\n}\n.tool-code::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {\n    background: #555;\n    border-radius: 3px;\n}\n\n.empty-state {\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: center;\n    height: 100%;\n    color: var(--text-muted);\n}\n\n.empty-state i {\n    font-size: 2rem;\n    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;\n    opacity: 0.5;\n}\n\n/* ========== Cline/Kilo/BlackboxAI 环境详情样式 ========== */\n.item-card-icon.env {\n    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #11998e 0%, #38ef7d 100%);\n}\n\n.env-details {\n    font-size: 0.75rem;\n    color: var(--text-secondary);\n}\n\n.env-section {\n    margin-bottom: 0.75rem;\n    padding: 0.5rem;\n    background: var(--bg-secondary);\n    border-radius: 6px;\n    border-left: 3px solid #38ef7d;\n}\n\n.env-section:last-child {\n    margin-bottom: 0;\n}\n\n.env-section-title {\n    font-weight: 600;\n    font-size: 0.7rem;\n    color: #38ef7d;\n    margin-bottom: 0.35rem;\n    text-transform: uppercase;\n    letter-spacing: 0.5px;\n}\n\n.env-section-content {\n    font-family: 'Consolas', 'Monaco', monospace;\n    font-size: 0.7rem;\n    white-space: pre-wrap;\n    word-break: break-word;\n    color: var(--text-primary);\n    line-height: 1.5;\n}\n\n.env-raw {\n    font-family: 'Consolas', 'Monaco', monospace;\n    font-size: 0.7rem;\n    white-space: pre-wrap;\n    word-break: break-word;\n    background: var(--bg-secondary);\n    padding: 0.5rem;\n    border-radius: 6px;\n    margin: 0;\n}\n\n/* 工具结果卡片图标 */\n.item-card-icon.tool-result {\n    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f093fb 0%, #f5576c 100%);\n}\n\n/* Cline 风格用户消息中的工具结果标记 */\n.timeline-node.user-node .node-preview .tool-result-badge {\n    display: inline-block;\n    background: rgba(240, 147, 251, 0.2);\n    color: #f093fb;\n    font-size: 0.6rem;\n    padding: 0.1rem 0.3rem;\n    border-radius: 4px;\n    margin-right: 0.3rem;\n}\n\n/* 时间线中的工具结果节点样式 */\n.timeline-node.user-node.tool-result-node {\n    background: rgba(240, 147, 251, 0.08);\n    border-left-color: rgba(240, 147, 251, 0.4);\n}\n\n.timeline-node.user-node.tool-result-node:hover {\n    background: rgba(240, 147, 251, 0.15);\n}\n\n.timeline-node.user-node.tool-result-node .node-preview {\n    color: #c77dff;\n}\n\n[data-theme=\"dark\"] .timeline-node.user-node.tool-result-node .node-preview {\n    color: #e0aaff;\n}\n\n/* ========== 分页 ========== */\n.pagination-footer {\n    padding: 0.5rem 1rem;\n    border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);\n    display: flex;\n    justify-content: center;\n    gap: 0.25rem;\n    flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n.pagination-footer .page-btn {\n    padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem;\n    border: 1px solid var(--border-color);\n    background: var(--bg-card);\n    color: var(--text-primary);\n    border-radius: 4px;\n    font-size: 0.7rem;\n    cursor: pointer;\n}\n\n.pagination-footer .page-btn:hover {\n    background: var(--bg-secondary);\n}\n\n.pagination-footer .page-btn.active {\n    background: #667eea;\n    color: #fff;\n    border-color: #667eea;\n}\n\n/* ========== 视图模式切换 ========== */\n.view-mode-toggle {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15);\n    padding: 0.2rem;\n    border-radius: 8px;\n    gap: 0.15rem;\n}\n\n.view-mode-btn {\n    padding: 0.3rem 0.5rem;\n    border: none;\n    background: transparent;\n    border-radius: 6px;\n    font-size: 0.7rem;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);\n    transition: all 0.2s;\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: center;\n}\n\n.view-mode-btn:hover {\n    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9);\n    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);\n}\n\n.view-mode-btn.active {\n    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.25);\n    color: #fff;\n}\n\n/* ========== Raw Mode 样式 ========== */\n.raw-mode-container {\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    height: 100%;\n    max-height: calc(100vh - 280px);\n    background: var(--bg-card);\n    border: 1px solid var(--border-color);\n    border-radius: 8px;\n    overflow: hidden;\n}\n\n.raw-mode-header {\n    display: flex;\n    justify-content: space-between;\n    align-items: center;\n    padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;\n    background: var(--bg-secondary);\n    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);\n    flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n.raw-mode-label {\n    font-size: 0.75rem;\n    color: var(--text-secondary);\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.4rem;\n}\n\n.raw-mode-label i {\n    color: #667eea;\n}\n\n.raw-copy-btn {\n    background: transparent;\n    border: 1px solid var(--border-color);\n    color: var(--text-secondary);\n    padding: 0.3rem 0.6rem;\n    border-radius: 6px;\n    font-size: 0.7rem;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    transition: all 0.2s;\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: ## 🤖 Assistant #37 (Agent)

_2025-12-26 06:27Z_

已完成！我为 dashboard 页面添加了 loading 状态：

**修改内容：**

1. **`sessions.js`** - 在 `selectSession` 函数中：
   - 点击 session 后立即显示 timeline 和 detail 区域的 loading 状态
   - 添加了 4 个新函数：`showTimelineLoading()`、`showDetailLoading()`、`showTimelineError()`、`showDetailError()`
   - 如果请求失败，显示错误状态

2. **`dashboard.css`** - 添加了 loading 和 error 状态的样式：
   - `.loading-container` - loading 容器样式（带 spinner 和文字）
   - `.loading-text` - loading 文字脉冲动画效果
   - `.error-container` - 错误状态样式

**效果：**
- 用户点击左边栏的 session 后，中间的 Timeline 和右边的 Detail 区域会**立即**显示加载中的 spinner
- Timeline header 会显示 "Loading..."
- 数据加载完成后自动替换为真实内容
- 如果加载失败，会显示错误提示

这样用户就不会在网速慢的时候误以为没有响应了。

charset=utf-8\")\n\tc.Writer.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)\n\tif err := utils.RenderHTML(c.Writer, \"register.html\", gin.H{\n\t\t\"title\":       \"Register - LLM Chat History\",\n\t\t\"isLoggedIn\":  false,\n\t\t\"state\":       state,\n\t\t\"redirectURI\": redirectURI,\n\t\t\"isOAuth\":     isOAuth,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\tc.String(http.StatusInternalServerError, \"Template error: %v\", err)\n\t}\n}\n\n// checkAuthRedirect 检查认证状态，如果已登录则重定向到dashboard\nfunc checkAuthRedirect(c *gin.Context) bool {\n\tvar tokenString string\n\tvar found bool\n\n\t// 首先检查Authorization header\n\tauthHeader := c.GetHeader(\"Authorization\")\n\tif authHeader != \"\" {\n\t\ttokenString = authHeader\n\t\tif len(authHeader) > 7 && authHeader[:7] == \"Bearer \" {\n\t\t\ttokenString = authHeader[7:]\n\t\t}\n\t\tfound = true\n\t}\n\n\t// 如果没有Authorization header，检查token cookie\n\tif !found {\n\t\tif cookie, err := c.Cookie(\"token\"); charset=utf-8\")\n\tc.Writer.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)\n\tif err := utils.RenderHTML(c.Writer, \"dashboard.html\", gin.H{\n\t\t\"title\":      \"Dashboard - LLM Chat History\",\n\t\t\"username\":   username,\n\t\t\"userID\":     userID,\n\t\t\"isLoggedIn\": true,\n\t}); }

'active' : ''}\" \n             onclick=\"selectWorkspace('')\" title=\"Show all sessions\">\n            <i class=\"fas fa-globe\"></i>\n            <span class=\"workspace-name\">All Workspaces</span>\n            <span class=\"workspace-count\">${getTotalSessionCount(workspaces, noWorkspaceCount)}</span>\n        </div>\n    `;\n    \n    if (workspaces.length > 0) {\n        workspaces.forEach(ws => {\n            html += `\n                <div class=\"workspace-item ${currentWorkspace === ws.name ? 'active' : ''}\" \n                     onclick=\"selectWorkspace('${escapeHtml(ws.name)}')\" \n                     title=\"${escapeHtml(ws.path || ws.name)}\">\n                    <i class=\"fas fa-folder\"></i>\n                    <span class=\"workspace-name\">${escapeHtml(ws.name)}</span>\n                    <span class=\"workspace-count\">${ws.session_count}</span>\n                </div>\n            `;\n        });\n    }\n    \n    if (noWorkspaceCount > 0) {\n        html += `\n            <div class=\"workspace-item ${currentWorkspace === '__none__' ? 'active' : ''}\" \n                 onclick=\"selectWorkspace('__none__')\" title=\"Sessions without workspace info\">\n                <i class=\"fas fa-question-circle\"></i>\n                <span class=\"workspace-name\">No Workspace</span>\n                <span class=\"workspace-count\">${noWorkspaceCount}</span>\n            </div>\n        `;\n    }\n    \n    container.innerHTML = html;\n}\n\nfunction getTotalSessionCount(workspaces, noWorkspaceCount) {\n    let total = noWorkspaceCount;\n    workspaces.forEach(ws => total += ws.session_count);\n    return total;\n}\n\nfunction toggleWorkspaceDropdown() {\n    const dropdown = document.getElementById('workspaceDropdown');\n    const btn = document.getElementById('workspaceFilterBtn');\n    const isOpen = !dropdown.classList.contains('d-none');\n    \n    if (isOpen) {\n        dropdown.classList.add('d-none');\n        btn.classList.remove('active');\n    } else {\n        dropdown.classList.remove('d-none');\n        btn.classList.add('active');\n        loadWorkspaces(); }

{
  "contents": "#!/bin/bash\nset -e\n\n# ========================================\n# LLM Chat History Backend - 部署脚本\n# 适用于 EC2 + Cloudflare 的部署架构\n# ========================================\n\n# 颜色输出\nRED='\\033[0;31m'\nGREEN='\\033[0;32m'\nYELLOW='\\033[1;33m'\nNC='\\033[0m' # No Color\n\nlog_info() { echo -e \"${GREEN}[INFO]${NC} $1\"; }\nlog_warn() { echo -e \"${YELLOW}[WARN]${NC} $1\"; }\nlog_error() { echo -e \"${RED}[ERROR]${NC} $1\"; }\n\n# Docker Compose 命令（自动检测）\nCOMPOSE_CMD=\"\"\n\n# ========================================\n# 检测 Docker Compose 命令\n# ========================================\ndetect_compose_cmd() {\n    # 优先使用 docker compose (v2)\n    if docker compose version &> /dev/null; then\n        COMPOSE_CMD=\"docker compose\"\n    # 其次使用独立的 docker-compose\n    elif command -v docker-compose &> /dev/null; then\n        COMPOSE_CMD=\"docker-compose\"\n    else\n        COMPOSE_CMD=\"\"\n    fi\n    echo \"$COMPOSE_CMD\"\n}\n\n# ========================================\n# 安装 Docker Compose\n# ========================================\ninstall_compose() {\n    COMPOSE_CMD=$(detect_compose_cmd)\n    if [ -n \"$COMPOSE_CMD\" ]; then\n        log_info \"Docker Compose 已可用: $COMPOSE_CMD\"\n        return\n    fi\n\n    log_info \"正在安装 Docker Compose...\"\n    \n    # 下载最新的 docker-compose 独立版本\n    ARCH=$(uname -m)\n    if [ \"$ARCH\" = \"aarch64\" ]; then\n        ARCH=\"aarch64\"\n    elif [ \"$ARCH\" = \"x86_64\" ]; then\n        ARCH=\"x86_64\"\n    fi\n    \n    # 下载 docker-compose v2\n    curl -SL \"https://github.com/docker/compose/releases/latest/download/docker-compose-linux-${ARCH}\" -o /usr/local/bin/docker-compose\n    chmod +x /usr/local/bin/docker-compose\n    \n    # 验证安装\n    if docker-compose version &> /dev/null; then\n        COMPOSE_CMD=\"docker-compose\"\n        log_info \"Docker Compose 安装完成\"\n    else\n        log_error \"Docker Compose 安装失败\"\n        exit 1\n    fi\n}\n\n# ========================================\n# 配置变量 (请根据实际情况修改)\n# ========================================\nAPP_NAME=\"llm-chat-history\"\nAPP_DIR=\"/opt/${APP_NAME}\"\nDOMAIN=\"llm-chat-history.com\"\nSERVER_PORT=\"8080\"\nRDS_HOST=\"database-1.c01mkey2ujrp.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com\"\n\n# ========================================\n# 检查是否为 root 用户\n# ========================================\ncheck_root() {\n    if [ \"$EUID\" -ne 0 ]; then\n        log_error \"请使用 sudo 运行此脚本\"\n        exit 1\n    fi\n}\n\n# ========================================\n# 检测包管理器类型\n# ========================================\ndetect_package_manager() {\n    if command -v apt-get &> /dev/null; then\n        echo \"apt\"\n    elif command -v yum &> /dev/null; then\n        echo \"yum\"\n    elif command -v dnf &> /dev/null; then\n        echo \"dnf\"\n    else\n        echo \"unknown\"\n    fi\n}\n\n# ========================================\n# 安装 Docker 和 Docker Compose\n# ========================================\ninstall_docker() {\n    if command -v docker &> /dev/null; then\n        log_info \"Docker 已安装\"\n        # 确保 Docker 服务运行\n        systemctl start docker 2>/dev/null || true\n        systemctl enable docker 2>/dev/null || true\n        return\n    fi\n\n    log_info \"正在安装 Docker...\"\n    \n    PKG_MANAGER=$(detect_package_manager)\n    \n    case $PKG_MANAGER in\n        apt)\n            # Ubuntu/Debian\n            apt-get update\n            apt-get install -y \\\n                apt-transport-https \\\n                ca-certificates \\\n                curl \\\n                gnupg \\\n                lsb-release\n\n            curl -fsSL https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu/gpg | gpg --dearmor -o /usr/share/keyrings/docker-archive-keyring.gpg\n\n            echo \\\n                \"deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/docker-archive-keyring.gpg] https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu \\\n                $(lsb_release -cs) stable\" | tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/docker.list > /dev/null\n\n            apt-get update\n            apt-get install -y docker-ce docker-ce-cli containerd.io docker-compose-plugin\n            ;;\n        yum|dnf)\n            # Amazon Linux / RHEL / CentOS\n            $PKG_MANAGER install -y yum-utils 2>/dev/null || true\n            \n            # Amazon Linux 2023 使用 dnf\n            if [ -f /etc/os-release ] && grep -q \"Amazon Linux 2023\" /etc/os-release; then\n                dnf install -y docker\n            else\n                # Amazon Linux 2 或其他 RHEL 系统\n                amazon-linux-extras install docker -y 2>/dev/null || \\\n                yum install -y docker || \\\n                dnf install -y docker\n            fi\n            ;;\n        *)\n            log_error \"不支持的包管理器，请手动安装 Docker\"\n            exit 1\n            ;;\n    esac\n\n    # 启动 Docker\n    systemctl start docker\n    systemctl enable docker\n    \n    # 将当前用户添加到 docker 组（可选）\n    usermod -aG docker $(whoami) 2>/dev/null || true\n\n    log_info \"Docker 安装完成\"\n    \n    # 安装 Docker Compose\n    install_compose\n}\n\n# ========================================\n# 创建应用目录\n# ========================================\nsetup_app_dir() {\n    log_info \"创建应用目录...\"\n    mkdir -p ${APP_DIR}\n    mkdir -p ${APP_DIR}/data\n}\n\n# ========================================\n# 生成 .env 文件\n# ========================================\ngenerate_env() {\n    if [ -f \"${APP_DIR}/.env\" ]; then\n        log_warn \".env 文件已存在，跳过生成\"\n        return\n    fi\n\n    log_info \"生成 .env 文件...\"\n    \n    # 生成随机 JWT Secret\n    JWT_SECRET=$(openssl rand -hex 32)\n\n    cat > ${APP_DIR}/.env << EOF\n# 服务器配置\nSERVER_PORT=${SERVER_PORT}\nSERVER_MODE=release\n\n# AWS RDS PostgreSQL 配置\nRDS_HOST=${RDS_HOST}\nPOSTGRES_USER=postgres\nPOSTGRES_PASSWORD=YOUR_RDS_PASSWORD_HERE\nPOSTGRES_DB=chat_history\nPOSTGRES_SSLMODE=require\n\n# JWT 配置\nJWT_SECRET=${JWT_SECRET}\nEOF\n\n    chmod 600 ${APP_DIR}/.env\n    log_warn \"⚠️  请编辑 ${APP_DIR}/.env 设置 RDS 密码: POSTGRES_PASSWORD\"\n}\n\n# ========================================\n# 生成生产配置文件\n# ========================================\ngenerate_config() {\n    log_info \"生成 config.yaml...\"\n    \n    # 从 .env 读取配置\n    source ${APP_DIR}/.env\n\n    cat > ${APP_DIR}/config.yaml << EOF\nserver:\n  port: \"${SERVER_PORT}\"\n  mode: \"release\"\n  allowed_origins:\n    - \"https://${DOMAIN}\"\n    - \"https://www.${DOMAIN}\"\n\ndatabase:\n  driver: \"postgres\"\n  sqlite:\n    path: \"./data/chat_history.db\"\n  postgres:\n    host: \"${RDS_HOST}\"\n    port: \"5432\"\n    user: \"${POSTGRES_USER}\"\n    password: \"${POSTGRES_PASSWORD}\"\n    dbname: \"${POSTGRES_DB}\"\n    sslmode: \"${POSTGRES_SSLMODE:-require}\"\n\njwt:\n  secret: \"${JWT_SECRET}\"\n  expire_hour: 24\n\nemail:\n  smtp_host: \"smtp.gmail.com\"\n  smtp_port: 587\n  username: \"llm.chat.history@gmail.com\"\n  password: \"\"\n  from_address: \"llm.chat.history@gmail.com\"\n  from_name: \"LLM Chat History\"\n  enable_ssl: false\nEOF\n\n    chmod 600 ${APP_DIR}/config.yaml\n    log_info \"config.yaml 已生成\"\n}\n\n# ========================================\n# 复制项目文件\n# ========================================\ncopy_project_files() {\n    log_info \"复制项目文件...\"\n    \n    # 如果在项目目录中运行\n    if [ -f \"docker-compose.yml\" ]; then\n        cp docker-compose.yml ${APP_DIR}/\n        cp Dockerfile ${APP_DIR}/\n        cp -r controllers ${APP_DIR}/\n        cp -r config ${APP_DIR}/\n        cp -r database ${APP_DIR}/\n        cp -r middleware ${APP_DIR}/\n        cp -r models ${APP_DIR}/\n        cp -r routes ${APP_DIR}/\n        cp -r static ${APP_DIR}/\n        cp -r templates ${APP_DIR}/\n        cp -r utils ${APP_DIR}/\n        cp main.go ${APP_DIR}/\n        cp go.mod ${APP_DIR}/\n        cp go.sum ${APP_DIR}/\n        log_info \"项目文件复制完成\"\n    else\n        log_warn \"未找到项目文件，请手动复制或使用 git clone\"\n    fi\n}\n\n# ========================================\n# 启动应用\n# ========================================\nstart_app() {\n    log_info \"启动应用...\"\n    cd ${APP_DIR}\n    \n    # 确保 COMPOSE_CMD 已设置\n    [ -z \"$COMPOSE_CMD\" ] && COMPOSE_CMD=$(detect_compose_cmd)\n    [ -z \"$COMPOSE_CMD\" ] && { log_error \"Docker Compose 未安装\"; exit 1; }\n    \n    $COMPOSE_CMD down 2>/dev/null || true\n    $COMPOSE_CMD up -d --build\n    log_info \"应用启动完成\"\n}\n\n# ========================================\n# 检查应用状态\n# ========================================\ncheck_status() {\n    log_info \"检查应用状态...\"\n    cd ${APP_DIR}\n    \n    [ -z \"$COMPOSE_CMD\" ] && COMPOSE_CMD=$(detect_compose_cmd)\n    $COMPOSE_CMD ps\n    \n    # 等待健康检查\n    log_info \"等待服务就绪...\"\n    sleep 10\n    \n    if curl -s -o /dev/null -w \"%{http_code}\" http://localhost:${SERVER_PORT}/ | grep -q \"200\\|302\"; then\n        log_info \"✅ 应用运行正常!\"\n    else\n        log_warn \"应用可能还在启动中，请稍后检查\"\n    fi\n}\n\n# ========================================\n# 配置防火墙\n# ========================================\nsetup_firewall() {\n    log_info \"配置防火墙...\"\n    \n    # 尝试使用 ufw (Ubuntu/Debian)\n    if command -v ufw &> /dev/null; then\n        ufw allow 22/tcp    # SSH\n        ufw allow 80/tcp    # HTTP\n        ufw allow 443/tcp   # HTTPS\n        log_info \"ufw 防火墙配置完成\"\n    # 尝试使用 firewalld (RHEL/CentOS/Amazon Linux)\n    elif command -v firewall-cmd &> /dev/null; then\n        systemctl start firewalld 2>/dev/null || true\n        firewall-cmd --permanent --add-service=ssh 2>/dev/null || true\n        firewall-cmd --permanent --add-service=http 2>/dev/null || true\n        firewall-cmd --permanent --add-service=https 2>/dev/null || true\n        firewall-cmd --reload 2>/dev/null || true\n        log_info \"firewalld 防火墙配置完成\"\n    else\n        log_warn \"未找到防火墙工具，EC2 请通过 AWS 安全组配置\"\n    fi\n}\n\n# ========================================\n# 显示部署信息\n# ========================================\nshow_info() {\n    echo \"\"\n    echo \"========================================\"\n    echo \"         部署完成!\"\n    echo \"========================================\"\n    echo \"\"\n    log_info \"应用目录: ${APP_DIR}\"\n    log_info \"服务端口: ${SERVER_PORT}\"\n    log_info \"域名: ${DOMAIN}\"\n    log_info \"RDS 地址: ${RDS_HOST}\"\n    echo \"\"\n    echo \"⚠️  重要：下一步操作\"\n    echo \"========================================\"\n    echo \"1. 编辑 ${APP_DIR}/.env 设置 RDS 密码:\"\n    echo \"   sudo nano ${APP_DIR}/.env\"\n    echo \"   修改 POSTGRES_PASSWORD=你的RDS密码\"\n    echo \"\"\n    echo \"2. 重新生成配置并启动:\"\n    echo \"   sudo rm ${APP_DIR}/config.yaml\"\n    echo \"   sudo bash ${APP_DIR}/deploy.sh restart\"\n    echo \"\"\n    echo \"3. 在 Cloudflare 中配置 DNS:\"\n    echo \"   - A 记录: @ → 此服务器 IP (已代理)\"\n    echo \"   - A 记录: www → 此服务器 IP (已代理)\"\n    echo \"\"\n    echo \"4. Cloudflare SSL/TLS 设置:\"\n    echo \"   - 选择 'Flexible' 模式\"\n    echo \"\"\n    [ -z \"$COMPOSE_CMD\" ] && COMPOSE_CMD=$(detect_compose_cmd)\n    echo \"常用命令:\"\n    echo \"  查看日志: cd ${APP_DIR} && $COMPOSE_CMD logs -f\"\n    echo \"  重启服务: cd ${APP_DIR} && $COMPOSE_CMD restart\"\n    echo \"  停止服务: cd ${APP_DIR} && $COMPOSE_CMD down\"\n    echo \"\"\n}\n\n# ========================================\n# 主函数\n# ========================================\nmain() {\n    echo \"========================================\"\n    echo \" LLM Chat History Backend 部署脚本\"\n    echo \"========================================\"\n    echo \"\"\n\n    # 检测 Docker Compose 命令\n    COMPOSE_CMD=$(detect_compose_cmd)\n\n    case \"${1:-install}\" in\n        install)\n            check_root\n            install_docker\n            setup_app_dir\n            generate_env\n            generate_config\n            copy_project_files\n            setup_firewall\n            start_app\n            check_status\n            show_info\n            ;;\n        start)\n            [ -z \"$COMPOSE_CMD\" ] && { log_error \"Docker Compose 未安装，请先运行: sudo ./deploy.sh install\"; exit 1; }\n            cd ${APP_DIR}\n            $COMPOSE_CMD up -d\n            ;;\n        stop)\n            [ -z \"$COMPOSE_CMD\" ] && { log_error \"Docker Compose 未安装\"; exit 1; }\n            cd ${APP_DIR}\n            $COMPOSE_CMD down\n            ;;\n        restart)\n            [ -z \"$COMPOSE_CMD\" ] && { log_error \"Docker Compose 未安装\"; exit 1; }\n            cd ${APP_DIR}\n            $COMPOSE_CMD restart\n            ;;\n        logs)\n            [ -z \"$COMPOSE_CMD\" ] && { log_error \"Docker Compose 未安装\"; exit 1; }\n            cd ${APP_DIR}\n            $COMPOSE_CMD logs -f\n            ;;\n        status)\n            [ -z \"$COMPOSE_CMD\" ] && { log_error \"Docker Compose 未安装\"; exit 1; }\n            cd ${APP_DIR}\n            $COMPOSE_CMD ps\n            ;;\n        update)\n            [ -z \"$COMPOSE_CMD\" ] && { log_error \"Docker Compose 未安装\"; exit 1; }\n            log_info \"更新应用...\"\n            cd ${APP_DIR}\n            $COMPOSE_CMD down\n            $COMPOSE_CMD build --no-cache\n            $COMPOSE_CMD up -d\n            log_info \"更新完成\"\n            ;;\n        *)\n            echo \"用法: $0 {install|start|stop|restart|logs|status|update}\"\n            exit 1\n            ;;\n    esac\n}\n\nmain \"$@\"\n",

  "contentsAfterEdit": "#!/bin/bash\nset -e\n\n# ========================================\n# LLM Chat History Backend - 部署脚本\n# 适用于 EC2 + Cloudflare 的部署架构\n# ========================================\n\n# 颜色输出\nRED='\\033[0;31m'\nGREEN='\\033[0;32m'\nYELLOW='\\033[1;33m'\nNC='\\033[0m' # No Color\n\nlog_info() { echo -e \"${GREEN}[INFO]${NC} $1\"; }\nlog_warn() { echo -e \"${YELLOW}[WARN]${NC} $1\"; }\nlog_error() { echo -e \"${RED}[ERROR]${NC} $1\"; }\n\n# Docker Compose 命令（自动检测）\nCOMPOSE_CMD=\"\"\n\n# ========================================\n# 检测 Docker Compose 命令\n# ========================================\ndetect_compose_cmd() {\n    # 优先使用 docker compose (v2)\n    if docker compose version &> /dev/null; then\n        COMPOSE_CMD=\"docker compose\"\n    # 其次使用独立的 docker-compose\n    elif command -v docker-compose &> /dev/null; then\n        COMPOSE_CMD=\"docker-compose\"\n    else\n        COMPOSE_CMD=\"\"\n    fi\n    echo \"$COMPOSE_CMD\"\n}\n\n# ========================================\n# 安装 Docker Compose\n# ========================================\ninstall_compose() {\n    COMPOSE_CMD=$(detect_compose_cmd)\n    if [ -n \"$COMPOSE_CMD\" ]; then\n        log_info \"Docker Compose 已可用: $COMPOSE_CMD\"\n        return\n    fi\n\n    log_info \"正在安装 Docker Compose...\"\n    \n    # 下载最新的 docker-compose 独立版本\n    ARCH=$(uname -m)\n    if [ \"$ARCH\" = \"aarch64\" ]; then\n        ARCH=\"aarch64\"\n    elif [ \"$ARCH\" = \"x86_64\" ]; then\n        ARCH=\"x86_64\"\n    fi\n    \n    # 下载 docker-compose v2\n    curl -SL \"https://github.com/docker/compose/releases/latest/download/docker-compose-linux-${ARCH}\" -o /usr/local/bin/docker-compose\n    chmod +x /usr/local/bin/docker-compose\n    \n    # 验证安装\n    if docker-compose version &> /dev/null; then\n        COMPOSE_CMD=\"docker-compose\"\n        log_info \"Docker Compose 安装完成\"\n    else\n        log_error \"Docker Compose 安装失败\"\n        exit 1\n    fi\n}\n\n# ========================================\n# 配置变量 (请根据实际情况修改)\n# ========================================\nAPP_NAME=\"llm-chat-history\"\nAPP_DIR=\"/opt/${APP_NAME}\"\nDOMAIN=\"llm-chat-history.com\"\nSERVER_PORT=\"8080\"\nRDS_HOST=\"database-1.c01mkey2ujrp.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com\"\n\n# ========================================\n# 检查是否为 root 用户\n# ========================================\ncheck_root() {\n    if [ \"$EUID\" -ne 0 ]; then\n        log_error \"请使用 sudo 运行此脚本\"\n        exit 1\n    fi\n}\n\n# ========================================\n# 检测包管理器类型\n# ========================================\ndetect_package_manager() {\n    if command -v apt-get &> /dev/null; then\n        echo \"apt\"\n    elif command -v yum &> /dev/null; then\n        echo \"yum\"\n    elif command -v dnf &> /dev/null; then\n        echo \"dnf\"\n    else\n        echo \"unknown\"\n    fi\n}\n\n# ========================================\n# 安装 Docker 和 Docker Compose\n# ========================================\ninstall_docker() {\n    if command -v docker &> /dev/null; then\n        log_info \"Docker 已安装\"\n        # 确保 Docker 服务运行\n        systemctl start docker 2>/dev/null || true\n        systemctl enable docker 2>/dev/null || true\n        return\n    fi\n\n    log_info \"正在安装 Docker...\"\n    \n    PKG_MANAGER=$(detect_package_manager)\n    \n    case $PKG_MANAGER in\n        apt)\n            # Ubuntu/Debian\n            apt-get update\n            apt-get install -y \\\n                apt-transport-https \\\n                ca-certificates \\\n                curl \\\n                gnupg \\\n                lsb-release\n\n            curl -fsSL https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu/gpg | gpg --dearmor -o /usr/share/keyrings/docker-archive-keyring.gpg\n\n            echo \\\n                \"deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/docker-archive-keyring.gpg] https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu \\\n                $(lsb_release -cs) stable\" | tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/docker.list > /dev/null\n\n            apt-get update\n            apt-get install -y docker-ce docker-ce-cli containerd.io docker-compose-plugin\n            ;;\n        yum|dnf)\n            # Amazon Linux / RHEL / CentOS\n            $PKG_MANAGER install -y yum-utils 2>/dev/null || true\n            \n            # Amazon Linux 2023 使用 dnf\n            if [ -f /etc/os-release ] && grep -q \"Amazon Linux 2023\" /etc/os-release; then\n                dnf install -y docker\n            else\n                # Amazon Linux 2 或其他 RHEL 系统\n                amazon-linux-extras install docker -y 2>/dev/null || \\\n                yum install -y docker || \\\n                dnf install -y docker\n            fi\n            ;;\n        *)\n            log_error \"不支持的包管理器，请手动安装 Docker\"\n            exit 1\n            ;;\n    esac\n\n    # 启动 Docker\n    systemctl start docker\n    systemctl enable docker\n    \n    # 将当前用户添加到 docker 组（可选）\n    usermod -aG docker $(whoami) 2>/dev/null || true\n\n    log_info \"Docker 安装完成\"\n    \n    # 安装 Docker Compose\n    install_compose\n}\n\n# ========================================\n# 创建应用目录\n# ========================================\nsetup_app_dir() {\n    log_info \"创建应用目录...\"\n    mkdir -p ${APP_DIR}\n    mkdir -p ${APP_DIR}/data\n}\n\n# ========================================\n# 生成 .env 文件\n# ========================================\ngenerate_env() {\n    if [ -f \"${APP_DIR}/.env\" ]; then\n        log_warn \".env 文件已存在，跳过生成\"\n        return\n    fi\n\n    log_info \"生成 .env 文件...\"\n    \n    # 生成随机 JWT Secret\n    JWT_SECRET=$(openssl rand -hex 32)\n\n    cat > ${APP_DIR}/.env << EOF\n# 服务器配置\nSERVER_PORT=${SERVER_PORT}\nSERVER_MODE=release\n\n# AWS RDS PostgreSQL 配置\nRDS_HOST=${RDS_HOST}\nPOSTGRES_USER=postgres\nPOSTGRES_PASSWORD=YOUR_RDS_PASSWORD_HERE\nPOSTGRES_DB=chat_history\nPOSTGRES_SSLMODE=require\n\n# JWT 配置\nJWT_SECRET=${JWT_SECRET}\nEOF\n\n    chmod 600 ${APP_DIR}/.env\n    log_warn \"⚠️  请编辑 ${APP_DIR}/.env 设置 RDS 密码: POSTGRES_PASSWORD\"\n}\n\n# ========================================\n# 生成生产配置文件\n# ========================================\ngenerate_config() {\n    log_info \"生成 config.yaml...\"\n    \n    # 从 .env 读取配置\n    source ${APP_DIR}/.env\n\n    cat > ${APP_DIR}/config.yaml << EOF\nserver:\n  port: \"${SERVER_PORT}\"\n  mode: \"release\"\n  allowed_origins:\n    - \"https://${DOMAIN}\"\n    - \"https://www.${DOMAIN}\"\n\ndatabase:\n  driver: \"postgres\"\n  sqlite:\n    path: \"./data/chat_history.db\"\n  postgres:\n    host: \"${RDS_HOST}\"\n    port: \"5432\"\n    user: \"${POSTGRES_USER}\"\n    password: \"${POSTGRES_PASSWORD}\"\n    dbname: \"${POSTGRES_DB}\"\n    sslmode: \"${POSTGRES_SSLMODE:-require}\"\n\njwt:\n  secret: \"${JWT_SECRET}\"\n  expire_hour: 24\n\nemail:\n  smtp_host: \"smtp.gmail.com\"\n  smtp_port: 587\n  username: \"llm.chat.history@gmail.com\"\n  password: \"\"\n  from_address: \"llm.chat.history@gmail.com\"\n  from_name: \"LLM Chat History\"\n  enable_ssl: false\nEOF\n\n    chmod 600 ${APP_DIR}/config.yaml\n    log_info \"config.yaml 已生成\"\n}\n\n# ========================================\n# 复制项目文件\n# ========================================\ncopy_project_files() {\n    log_info \"复制项目文件...\"\n    \n    # 如果在项目目录中运行\n    if [ -f \"docker-compose.yml\" ]; then\n        cp docker-compose.yml ${APP_DIR}/\n        cp Dockerfile ${APP_DIR}/\n        cp -r controllers ${APP_DIR}/\n        cp -r config ${APP_DIR}/\n        cp -r database ${APP_DIR}/\n        cp -r middleware ${APP_DIR}/\n        cp -r models ${APP_DIR}/\n        cp -r routes ${APP_DIR}/\n        cp -r static ${APP_DIR}/\n        cp -r templates ${APP_DIR}/\n        cp -r utils ${APP_DIR}/\n        cp main.go ${APP_DIR}/\n        cp go.mod ${APP_DIR}/\n        cp go.sum ${APP_DIR}/\n        log_info \"项目文件复制完成\"\n    else\n        log_warn \"未找到项目文件，请手动复制或使用 git clone\"\n    fi\n}\n\n# ========================================\n# 启动应用\n# ========================================\nstart_app() {\n    log_info \"启动应用...\"\n    cd ${APP_DIR}\n    \n    # 确保 COMPOSE_CMD 已设置\n    [ -z \"$COMPOSE_CMD\" ] && COMPOSE_CMD=$(detect_compose_cmd)\n    [ -z \"$COMPOSE_CMD\" ] && { log_error \"Docker Compose 未安装\"; exit 1; }\n    \n    $COMPOSE_CMD down 2>/dev/null || true\n    $COMPOSE_CMD up -d --build\n    log_info \"应用启动完成\"\n}\n\n# ========================================\n# 检查应用状态\n# ========================================\ncheck_status() {\n    log_info \"检查应用状态...\"\n    cd ${APP_DIR}\n    \n    [ -z \"$COMPOSE_CMD\" ] && COMPOSE_CMD=$(detect_compose_cmd)\n    $COMPOSE_CMD ps\n    \n    # 等待健康检查\n    log_info \"等待服务就绪...\"\n    sleep 10\n    \n    if curl -s -o /dev/null -w \"%{http_code}\" http://localhost:${SERVER_PORT}/ | grep -q \"200\\|302\"; then\n        log_info \"✅ 应用运行正常!\"\n    else\n        log_warn \"应用可能还在启动中，请稍后检查\"\n    fi\n}\n\n# ========================================\n# 配置防火墙\n# ========================================\nsetup_firewall() {\n    log_info \"配置防火墙...\"\n    \n    # 尝试使用 ufw (Ubuntu/Debian)\n    if command -v ufw &> /dev/null; then\n        ufw allow 22/tcp    # SSH\n        ufw allow 80/tcp    # HTTP\n        ufw allow 443/tcp   # HTTPS\n        log_info \"ufw 防火墙配置完成\"\n    # 尝试使用 firewalld (RHEL/CentOS/Amazon Linux)\n    elif command -v firewall-cmd &> /dev/null; then\n        systemctl start firewalld 2>/dev/null || true\n        firewall-cmd --permanent --add-service=ssh 2>/dev/null || true\n        firewall-cmd --permanent --add-service=http 2>/dev/null || true\n        firewall-cmd --permanent --add-service=https 2>/dev/null || true\n        firewall-cmd --reload 2>/dev/null || true\n        log_info \"firewalld 防火墙配置完成\"\n    else\n        log_warn \"未找到防火墙工具，EC2 请通过 AWS 安全组配置\"\n    fi\n}\n\n# ========================================\n# 显示部署信息\n# ========================================\nshow_info() {\n    echo \"\"\n    echo \"========================================\"\n    echo \"         部署完成!\"\n    echo \"========================================\"\n    echo \"\"\n    log_info \"应用目录: ${APP_DIR}\"\n    log_info \"服务端口: ${SERVER_PORT}\"\n    log_info \"域名: ${DOMAIN}\"\n    log_info \"RDS 地址: ${RDS_HOST}\"\n    echo \"\"\n    echo \"⚠️  重要：下一步操作\"\n    echo \"========================================\"\n    echo \"1. 编辑 ${APP_DIR}/.env 设置 RDS 密码:\"\n    echo \"   sudo nano ${APP_DIR}/.env\"\n    echo \"   修改 POSTGRES_PASSWORD=你的RDS密码\"\n    echo \"\"\n    echo \"2. 重新生成配置并启动:\"\n    echo \"   sudo rm ${APP_DIR}/config.yaml\"\n    echo \"   sudo bash ${APP_DIR}/deploy.sh restart\"\n    echo \"\"\n    echo \"3. 在 Cloudflare 中配置 DNS:\"\n    echo \"   - A 记录: @ → 此服务器 IP (已代理)\"\n    echo \"   - A 记录: www → 此服务器 IP (已代理)\"\n    echo \"\"\n    echo \"4. Cloudflare SSL/TLS 设置:\"\n    echo \"   - 选择 'Flexible' 模式\"\n    echo \"\"\n    [ -z \"$COMPOSE_CMD\" ] && COMPOSE_CMD=$(detect_compose_cmd)\n    echo \"常用命令:\"\n    echo \"  查看日志: cd ${APP_DIR} && $COMPOSE_CMD logs -f\"\n    echo \"  重启服务: cd ${APP_DIR} && $COMPOSE_CMD restart\"\n    echo \"  停止服务: cd ${APP_DIR} && $COMPOSE_CMD down\"\n    echo \"\"\n}\n\n# ========================================\n# 主函数\n# ========================================\nmain() {\n    echo \"========================================\"\n    echo \" LLM Chat History Backend 部署脚本\"\n    echo \"========================================\"\n    echo \"\"\n\n    # 检测 Docker Compose 命令\n    COMPOSE_CMD=$(detect_compose_cmd)\n\n    case \"${1:-install}\" in\n        install)\n            check_root\n            install_docker\n            setup_app_dir\n            generate_env\n            generate_config\n            copy_project_files\n            setup_firewall\n            start_app\n            check_status\n            show_info\n            ;;\n        start)\n            [ -z \"$COMPOSE_CMD\" ] && { log_error \"Docker Compose 未安装，请先运行: sudo ./deploy.sh install\"; exit 1; }\n            cd ${APP_DIR}\n            $COMPOSE_CMD up -d\n            ;;\n        stop)\n            [ -z \"$COMPOSE_CMD\" ] && { log_error \"Docker Compose 未安装\"; exit 1; }\n            cd ${APP_DIR}\n            $COMPOSE_CMD down\n            ;;\n        restart)\n            [ -z \"$COMPOSE_CMD\" ] && { log_error \"Docker Compose 未安装\"; exit 1; }\n            cd ${APP_DIR}\n            $COMPOSE_CMD restart\n            ;;\n        logs)\n            [ -z \"$COMPOSE_CMD\" ] && { log_error \"Docker Compose 未安装\"; exit 1; }\n            cd ${APP_DIR}\n            $COMPOSE_CMD logs -f\n            ;;\n        status)\n            [ -z \"$COMPOSE_CMD\" ] && { log_error \"Docker Compose 未安装\"; exit 1; }\n            cd ${APP_DIR}\n            $COMPOSE_CMD ps\n            ;;\n        update)\n            [ -z \"$COMPOSE_CMD\" ] && { log_error \"Docker Compose 未安装\"; exit 1; }\n            log_info \"更新应用...\"\n            cd ${APP_DIR}\n            # 生成构建时间戳用于静态资源版本控制\n            export BUILD_TIME=$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)\n            log_info \"构建时间戳: ${BUILD_TIME}\"\n            $COMPOSE_CMD down\n            $COMPOSE_CMD build --no-cache\n            $COMPOSE_CMD up -d\n            log_info \"更新完成\"\n            ;;\n        *)\n            echo \"用法: $0 {install|start|stop|restart|logs|status|update}\"\n            exit 1\n            ;;\n    esac\n}\n\nmain \"$@\"\n"
}

then\n        log_info \"✅ 应用运行正常!\"\n    else\n        log_warn \"应用可能还在启动中，请稍后检查\"\n    fi\n}\n\n# ========================================\n# 配置防火墙\n# ========================================\nsetup_firewall() {\n    log_info \"配置防火墙...\"\n    \n    # 尝试使用 ufw (Ubuntu/Debian)\n    if command -v ufw &> /dev/null; then\n        ufw allow 22/tcp    # SSH\n        ufw allow 80/tcp    # HTTP\n        ufw allow 443/tcp   # HTTPS\n        log_info \"ufw 防火墙配置完成\"\n    # 尝试使用 firewalld (RHEL/CentOS/Amazon Linux)\n    elif command -v firewall-cmd &> /dev/null; then\n        systemctl start firewalld 2>/dev/null || true\n        firewall-cmd --permanent --add-service=ssh 2>/dev/null || true\n        firewall-cmd --permanent --add-service=http 2>/dev/null || true\n        firewall-cmd --permanent --add-service=https 2>/dev/null || true\n        firewall-cmd --reload 2>/dev/null || true\n        log_info \"firewalld 防火墙配置完成\"\n    else\n        log_warn \"未找到防火墙工具，EC2 请通过 AWS 安全组配置\"\n    fi\n}\n\n# ========================================\n# 显示部署信息\n# ========================================\nshow_info() {\n    echo \"\"\n    echo \"========================================\"\n    echo \"         部署完成!\"\n    echo \"========================================\"\n    echo \"\"\n    log_info \"应用目录: ${APP_DIR}\"\n    log_info \"服务端口: ${SERVER_PORT}\"\n    log_info \"域名: ${DOMAIN}\"\n    log_info \"RDS 地址: ${RDS_HOST}\"\n    echo \"\"\n    echo \"⚠️  重要：下一步操作\"\n    echo \"========================================\"\n    echo \"1. 编辑 ${APP_DIR}/.env 设置 RDS 密码:\"\n    echo \"   sudo nano ${APP_DIR}/.env\"\n    echo \"   修改 POSTGRES_PASSWORD=你的RDS密码\"\n    echo \"\"\n    echo \"2. 重新生成配置并启动:\"\n    echo \"   sudo rm ${APP_DIR}/config.yaml\"\n    echo \"   sudo bash ${APP_DIR}/deploy.sh restart\"\n    echo \"\"\n    echo \"3. 在 Cloudflare 中配置 DNS:\"\n    echo \"   - A 记录: @ → 此服务器 IP (已代理)\"\n    echo \"   - A 记录: www → 此服务器 IP (已代理)\"\n    echo \"\"\n    echo \"4. Cloudflare SSL/TLS 设置:\"\n    echo \"   - 选择 'Flexible' 模式\"\n    echo \"\"\n    [ -z \"$COMPOSE_CMD\" ] && COMPOSE_CMD=$(detect_compose_cmd)\n    echo \"常用命令:\"\n    echo \"  查看日志: cd ${APP_DIR} && $COMPOSE_CMD logs -f\"\n    echo \"  重启服务: cd ${APP_DIR} && $COMPOSE_CMD restart\"\n    echo \"  停止服务: cd ${APP_DIR} && $COMPOSE_CMD down\"\n    echo \"\"\n}\n\n# ========================================\n# 主函数\n# ========================================\nmain() {\n    echo \"========================================\"\n    echo \" LLM Chat History Backend 部署脚本\"\n    echo \"========================================\"\n    echo \"\"\n\n    # 检测 Docker Compose 命令\n    COMPOSE_CMD=$(detect_compose_cmd)\n\n    case \"${1:-install}\" in\n        install)\n            check_root\n            install_docker\n            setup_app_dir\n            generate_env\n            generate_config\n            copy_project_files\n            setup_firewall\n            start_app\n            check_status\n            show_info\n            ;;\n        start)\n            [ -z \"$COMPOSE_CMD\" ] && { log_error \"Docker Compose 未安装，请先运行: sudo ./deploy.sh install\"; exit 1; }\n            cd ${APP_DIR}\n            $COMPOSE_CMD up -d\n            ;;\n        stop)\n            [ -z \"$COMPOSE_CMD\" ] && { log_error \"Docker Compose 未安装\"; exit 1; }\n            cd ${APP_DIR}\n            $COMPOSE_CMD down\n            ;;\n        restart)\n            [ -z \"$COMPOSE_CMD\" ] && { log_error \"Docker Compose 未安装\"; exit 1; }\n            cd ${APP_DIR}\n            $COMPOSE_CMD restart\n            ;;\n        logs)\n            [ -z \"$COMPOSE_CMD\" ] && { log_error \"Docker Compose 未安装\"; exit 1; }\n            cd ${APP_DIR}\n            $COMPOSE_CMD logs -f\n            ;;\n        status)\n            [ -z \"$COMPOSE_CMD\" ] && { log_error \"Docker Compose 未安装\"; exit 1; }\n            cd ${APP_DIR}\n            $COMPOSE_CMD ps\n            ;;\n        update)\n            [ -z \"$COMPOSE_CMD\" ] && { log_error \"Docker Compose 未安装\"; exit 1; }\n            log_info \"更新应用...\"\n            cd ${APP_DIR}\n            # 生成构建时间戳用于静态资源版本控制\n            export BUILD_TIME=$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)\n            log_info \"构建时间戳: ${BUILD_TIME}\"\n            $COMPOSE_CMD down\n            $COMPOSE_CMD build --no-cache\n            $COMPOSE_CMD up -d\n            log_info \"更新完成\"\n            ;;\n        *)\n            echo \"用法: $0 {install|start|stop|restart|logs|status|update}\"\n            exit 1\n            ;;\n    esac\n}\n\nmain \"$@\"\n"
}

          </div>\r\n        </div>\r\n    </div>\r\n</div>\r\n\r\n<script>\r\nconst chatId = '{{.chatID}}';\r\nlet allMessages = [];\r\nlet groupedNodes = [];\r\nlet currentNodeIndex = -1;\r\nlet expandMode = 'click';  // 'click' or 'hover'\r\nlet allExpanded = false;\r\n\r\n// Cookie 操作函数\r\nfunction setCookie(name, value, days = 365) {\r\n    const expires = new Date(Date.now() + days * RegExp('(^| )' + name + '=([^;]+)'));\r\n    return match ? decodeURIComponent(match[2]) : null;\r\n}\r\n\r\n// 初始化展开模式（从 cookie 读取）\r\nfunction initExpandMode() {\r\n    const savedMode = document.querySelectorAll('.mode-btn').forEach(btn => {\r\n        btn.classList.toggle('active', btn.dataset.mode === expandMode);\r\n    });\r\n}\r\n\r\nasync function loadChatDetail() {\r\n    try {\r\n        const response = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/chat/sessions/${chatId}`);\r\n        const session = response.data.session;\r\n\r\n        document.getElementById('chatTitle').textContent = session.title;\r\n        document.getElementById('chatMeta').textContent =\r\n            `${session.source} • ${new Date(session.created_at).toLocaleDateString()}`;\r\n\r\n        allMessages = (session.messages || []).sort((a, b) => \r\n            new Date(a.timestamp) - new Date(b.timestamp)\r\n        );\r\n        \r\n        groupedNodes = groupMessages(allMessages);\r\n        \r\n        renderTimelineHeader();\r\n        renderStats();\r\n        renderTimeline();\r\n        \r\n        if (groupedNodes.length > 0) {\r\n            selectNode(0);\r\n        }\r\n    } catch (error) {\r\n        console.error('Failed to load chat detail:', error);\r\n        document.getElementById('timelineList').innerHTML = \r\n            '<div class=\"text-center text-danger py-4\">Failed to load</div>';\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction renderTimelineHeader() {\r\n    if (allMessages.length === 0) return;\r\n    \r\n    const firstTime = new 60);\r\n    const secs = seconds % 60;\r\n    if (minutes < 60) return `${minutes}m ${secs}s`;\r\n    const hours = Math.floor(minutes / 60);\r\n    const mins = minutes % 60;\r\n    return `${hours}h ${mins}m`;\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction groupMessages(messages) {\r\n    const groups = [];\r\n    let currentGroup = null;\r\n\r\n    messages.forEach((msg) => {\r\n        if (msg.type === 'user') {\r\n
