          messages: [msg],\r\n                timestamp: msg.timestamp\r\n            });\r\n        } else {\r\n            if (currentGroup && currentGroup.type === 'assistant') {\r\n                currentGroup.messages.push(msg);\r\n            } else {\r\n                if (currentGroup) groups.push(currentGroup);\r\n                currentGroup = {\r\n                    type: 'assistant',\r\n                    messages: [msg],\r\n                    timestamp: msg.timestamp\r\n                };\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    if (currentGroup) groups.push(currentGroup);\r\n    return groups;\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction renderStats() {\r\n    let userCount = 0, assistantMsgCount = 0, toolUseCount = 0;\r\n\r\n    allMessages.forEach(msg => {\r\n        if (msg.type === 'user') {\r\n            userCount++;\r\n        } else {\r\n            if (msg.content && msg.content.trim()) assistantMsgCount++;\r\n            if (msg.tool_uses) {\r\n                try {\r\n                    toolUseCount += JSON.parse(msg.tool_uses).length;\r\n                } catch(e) {}\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    document.getElementById('timelineStats').innerHTML = `\r\n        <span class=\"stat-item user\">💬 ${userCount}</span>\r\n        <span class=\"stat-item assistant\">🤖 ${assistantMsgCount}</span>\r\n        <span class=\"stat-item tools\">🔧 ${toolUseCount}</span>\r\n    `;\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction renderTimeline() {\r\n    const container = document.getElementById('timelineList');\r\n    \r\n    if (groupedNodes.length === 0) {\r\n        container.innerHTML = '<div class=\"text-center text-white-50 py-4\">No messages</div>';\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    container.innerHTML = groupedNodes.map((node, idx) => {\r\n        const isUser = node.type === 'user';\r\n        const icon = isUser ? '💬' : '🤖';\r\n        const nodeClass = isUser ? 'user-node' : 'assistant-node';\r\n        const time = new Date(node.timestamp).toLocaleTimeString([], {hour: '2-digit', minute:'2-digit'});\r\n        \r\n        const { preview, subItems, itemCount } = getNodeSummary(node);\r\n\r\n        return `\r\n            <div class=\"timeline-node ${nodeClass}\" data-index=\"${idx}\" onclick=\"selectNode(${idx})\">\r\n                <div class=\"node-header\">\r\n                    <span class=\"node-icon\">${icon}</span>\r\n                    <span class=\"node-preview\">${escapeHtml(preview)}</span>\r\n                    ${itemCount > 1 ? `<span class=\"node-count-badge\">${itemCount}</span>` : ''}\r\n                    <span class=\"node-time\">${time}</span>\r\n                </div>\r\n                ${subItems.length > 0 && !isUser ? `\r\n                    <div class=\"node-sub-items\">\r\n                        ${subItems.slice(0, 3).map(item => `\r\n                            <div class=\"node-sub-item\">\r\n                                <span class=\"sub-icon\">${item.icon}</span>\r\n                                <span>${escapeHtml(item.text)}</span>\r\n                            </div>\r\n                        `).join('')}\r\n                        ${subItems.length > 3 ? `<div class=\"node-sub-item\"><span class=\"sub-icon\">...</span><span>+${subItems.length - 3} more</span></div>` : ''}\r\n                    </div>\r\n                ` : ''}\r\n            </div>\r\n        `;\r\n    }).join('');\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction getNodeSummary(node) {\r\n    let preview = '', subItems = [], itemCount = 0;\r\n\r\n    if (node.type === 'user') {\r\n        preview = getTextPreview(node.messages[0].content, 28);\r\n        itemCount = 1;\r\n    } else {\r\n        node.messages.forEach(msg => {\r\n            if (msg.content && msg.content.trim()) {\r\n                subItems.push({ icon: '💬', text: getTextPreview(msg.content, 22), type: 'message', data: msg });\r\n                itemCount++;\r\n            }\r\n            if (msg.thinking) {\r\n                subItems.push({ icon: '💭', text: 'Thinking...', type: 'thinking', data: msg });\r\n            }\r\n            if (msg.tool_uses) {\r\n                try {\r\n                    JSON.parse(msg.tool_uses).forEach(tool => {\r\n                        subItems.push({ icon: '🔧', text: tool.name || 'Tool', type: 'tool', data: tool });\r\n                        itemCount++;\r\n                    });\r\n                } catch(e) {}\r\n            }\r\n        });\r\n\r\n        preview = subItems.length > 0 \r\n            ? (subItems[0].type === 'tool' ? `🔧 ${subItems[0].text}` : subItems[0].text)\r\n            : '(no content)';\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    return { preview, subItems, itemCount };\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction selectNode(index) {\r\n    currentNodeIndex = index;\r\n    const node = groupedNodes[index];\r\n    \r\n    document.querySelectorAll('.timeline-node').forEach((el, i) => {\r\n        el.classList.toggle('active', i === index);\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    const isUser = node.type === 'user';\r\n    document.getElementById('detailIcon').textContent = isUser ? '💬' : '🤖';\r\n    document.getElementById('detailType').textContent = isUser ? 'User Message' : 'Assistant Response';\r\n    \r\n    const msgCount = node.messages.length;\r\n    const timeRange = msgCount > 1 \r\n        ? `${new Date(node.messages[0].timestamp).toLocaleTimeString([], {hour:'2-digit', minute:'2-digit'})} - ${new Date(node.messages[msgCount-1].timestamp).toLocaleTimeString([], {hour:'2-digit', minute:'2-digit'})}`\r\n        : new Date(node.timestamp).toLocaleTimeString([], {hour:'2-digit', minute:'2-digit', second:'2-digit'});\r\n    document.getElementById('detailMeta').textContent = timeRange;\r\n\r\n    // 渲染汇总和内容\r\n    allExpanded = false;\r\n    updateExpandAllBtn();\r\n    renderDetailContent(node);\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction renderDetailContent(node) {\r\n    const container = document.getElementById('detailBody');\r\n    const summaryEl = document.getElementById('detailSummary');\r\n    \r\n    if (node.type === 'user') {\r\n        summaryEl.innerHTML = '';\r\n        document.getElementById('expandAllBtn').style.display = 'none';\r\n        \r\n        const msg = node.messages[0];\r\n        container.innerHTML = `\r\n            <div class=\"item-card\">\r\n                <div class=\"item-card-header\">\r\n                    <div class=\"item-card-icon message\">💬</div>\r\n                    <div class=\"item-card-title\">\r\n                        <div class=\"title-main\">User Message</div>\r\n                        <div class=\"title-sub\">${new Date(msg.timestamp).toLocaleTimeString()}</div>\r\n                    </div>\r\n                </div>\r\n                <div class=\"item-card-body\">\r\n                    <div class=\"content-text\">${formatContent(msg.content)}</div>\r\n                </div>\r\n            </div>\r\n        `;\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // 收集 Assistant 的所有项目\r\n    let items = [];\r\n    let thinkingCount = 0, messageCount = 0, toolCount = 0;\r\n\r\n    node.messages.forEach(msg => {\r\n        if (msg.thinking) {\r\n            thinkingCount++;\r\n            items.push({\r\n                type: 'thinking', icon: '💭', title: 'Thinking',\r\n                subtitle: getTextPreview(msg.thinking, 40),\r\n                content: msg.thinking, timestamp: msg.timestamp\r\n            });\r\n        }\r\n        if (msg.content && msg.content.trim()) {\r\n            messageCount++;\r\n            items.push({\r\n                type: 'message', icon: '💬', title: 'Message',\r\n                subtitle: msg.model_name || '',\r\n                content: msg.content, timestamp: msg.timestamp\r\n            });\r\n        }\r\n        if (msg.tool_uses) {\r\n            try {\r\n                JSON.parse(msg.tool_uses).forEach(tool => {\r\n                    toolCount++;\r\n                    items.push({\r\n                        type: 'tool', icon: '🔧', title: tool.name || 'Tool',\r\n                        subtitle: getToolStatus(tool),\r\n                        content: tool.markdown || JSON.stringify(tool, null, 2),\r\n                        timestamp: msg.timestamp\r\n                    });\r\n                });\r\n            } catch(e) {}\r\n        }\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    // 渲染汇总徽章\r\n    let summaryHtml = '';\r\n    if (thinkingCount > 0) summaryHtml += `<span class=\"summary-badge\">💭 ${thinkingCount} Thinking</span>`;\r\n    if (messageCount > 0) summaryHtml += `<span class=\"summary-badge\">💬 ${messageCount} Message</span>`;\r\n    if (toolCount > 0) summaryHtml += `<span class=\"summary-badge\">🔧 ${toolCount} Tools</span>`;\r\n    summaryEl.innerHTML = summaryHtml;\r\n\r\n    // 显示展开全部按钮\r\n    document.getElementById('expandAllBtn').style.display = expandMode === 'click' && items.length > 1 ? 'flex' : 'none';\r\n\r\n    if (items.length === 0) {\r\n        container.innerHTML = `<div class=\"empty-state\"><i class=\"fas fa-inbox\"></i><p>No content</p></div>`;\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    const hoverClass = expandMode === 'hover' ? 'hover-expand' : '';\r\n    \r\n    container.innerHTML = `<div class=\"${hoverClass}\">` + items.map((item, idx) => {\r\n        const isFirst = idx === 0;\r\n        const iconClass = item.type === 'tool' ? 'tool' : (item.type === 'thinking' ? 'thinking' : 'message');\r\n        const collapsed = expandMode === 'click' && !isFirst;\r\n        \r\n        return `\r\n            <div class=\"item-card\" data-index=\"${idx}\">\r\n                <div class=\"item-card-header ${collapsed ? 'collapsed' : ''}\" onclick=\"toggleItemCard(this)\">\r\n                    <div class=\"item-card-icon ${iconClass}\">${item.icon}</div>\r\n                    <div class=\"item-card-title\">\r\n                        <div class=\"title-main\">${escapeHtml(item.title)}</div>\r\n                        <div class=\"title-sub\">${escapeHtml(item.subtitle)}</div>\r\n                    </div>\r\n                    <i class=\"fas fa-chevron-down item-card-toggle\"></i>\r\n                </div>\r\n                <div class=\"item-card-body ${collapsed ? 'collapsed' : ''}\">\r\n                    ${item.type === 'tool' \r\n                        ? `<div class=\"tool-code\">${formatToolContent(item.content)}</div>`\r\n                        : `<div class=\"content-text\">${formatContent(item.content)}</div>`\r\n                    }\r\n                </div>\r\n            </div>\r\n        `;\r\n    }).join('') + '</div>';\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction setExpandMode(mode) {\r\n    expandMode = mode;\r\n    // 保存到 cookie\r\n    setCookie('expandMode', mode);\r\n    \r\n    document.querySelectorAll('.mode-btn').forEach(btn => {\r\n        btn.classList.toggle('active', btn.dataset.mode === mode);\r\n    });\r\n    \r\n    // 重新渲染当前节点\r\n    if (currentNodeIndex >= 0) {\r\n        selectNode(currentNodeIndex);\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction toggleExpandAll() {\r\n    allExpanded = !allExpanded;\r\n    updateExpandAllBtn();\r\n    \r\n    document.querySelectorAll('.item-card-header').forEach(header => {\r\n        const body = header.nextElementSibling;\r\n        if (allExpanded) {\r\n            header.classList.remove('collapsed');\r\n            body.classList.remove('collapsed');\r\n        } else {\r\n            // 只保留第一个展开\r\n            const isFirst = header.closest('.item-card').dataset.index === '0';\r\n            header.classList.toggle('collapsed', !isFirst);\r\n            body.classList.toggle('collapsed', !isFirst);\r\n        }\r\n    });\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction updateExpandAllBtn() {\r\n    const btn = document.getElementById('expandAllBtn');\r\n    if (allExpanded) {\r\n        btn.innerHTML = '<i class=\"fas fa-compress-alt\"></i> Collapse';\r\n    } else {\r\n        btn.innerHTML = '<i class=\"fas fa-expand-alt\"></i> Expand All';\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction toggleItemCard(header) {\r\n    if (expandMode === 'hover') return;\r\n    const body = header.nextElementSibling;\r\n    header.classList.toggle('collapsed');\r\n    body.classList.toggle('collapsed');\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction getToolStatus(tool) {\r\n    if (tool.status === 'completed') return '✓ Completed';\r\n    if (tool.status === 'error') return '✗ Error';\r\n    return '';\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction getTextPreview(text, maxLen) {\r\n    if (!text) return '(empty)';\r\n    const clean = text.replace(/\\n/g, ' ').replace(/\\s+/g, ' ').trim();\r\n    return clean.length > maxLen ? clean.substring(0, maxLen) + '...' : clean;\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction escapeHtml(text) {\r\n    if (!text) return '';\r\n    const div = document.createElement('div');\r\n    div.textContent = text;\r\n    return div.innerHTML;\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction formatContent(content) {\r\n    if (!content) return '';\r\n    let escaped = escapeHtml(content);\r\n    return escaped\r\n        .replace(/\\n/g, '<br>')\r\n        .replace(/`([^`]+)`/g, '<code>$1</code>')\r\n        .replace(/\\*\\*([^*]+)\\*\\*/g, '<strong>$1</strong>');\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction formatToolContent(text) {\r\n    if (!text) return '';\r\n    let processed = text\r\n        .replace(/\\\\r\\\\n/g, '\\n')\r\n        .replace(/\\\\n/g, '\\n')\r\n        .replace(/\\\\r/g, '')\r\n        .replace(/\\\\t/g, '    ')\r\n        .replace(/\\\\\"/g, '\"');\r\n    return escapeHtml(processed).replace(/\\n/g, '<br>');\r\n}\r\n\r\n// 键盘导航\r\ndocument.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {\r\n    if (e.key === 'ArrowUp' && currentNodeIndex > 0) {\r\n        selectNode(currentNodeIndex - 1);\r\n        scrollNodeIntoView(currentNodeIndex);\r\n        e.preventDefault();\r\n    } else if (e.key === 'ArrowDown' && currentNodeIndex < groupedNodes.length - 1) {\r\n        selectNode(currentNodeIndex + 1);\r\n        scrollNodeIntoView(currentNodeIndex);\r\n        e.preventDefault();\r\n    }\r\n});\r\n\r\nfunction scrollNodeIntoView(index) {\r\n    const node = document.querySelector(`.timeline-node[data-index=\"${index}\"]`);\r\n    if (node) node.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'nearest' });\r\n}\r\n\r\ndocument.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {\r\n    initExpandMode();  // 从 cookie 恢复用户偏好\r\n    loadChatDetail();\r\n});\r\n</script>\r\n{{end}}\r\n",

const saved = localStorage.getItem('lang');\n    if (saved) return saved;\n    const browserLang = navigator.language.toLowerCase();\n    return browserLang.startsWith('zh') ? 'zh' : 'en';\n}\n\n// 切换语言\nfunction switchLang(lang) {\n    localStorage.setItem('lang', lang);\n    applyLang(lang);\n    \n    // 更新按钮状态\n    document.querySelectorAll('.lang-btn').forEach(btn => {\n        btn.classList.toggle('active', btn.dataset.lang === lang);\n    });\n}\n\n// 应用语言\nfunction applyLang(lang) {\n    const texts = i18n[lang] || i18n.en;\n    \n    document.querySelectorAll('[data-i18n]').forEach(el => {\n        const key = el.getAttribute('data-i18n');\n        if (texts[key]) {\n            if (el.tagName === 'A' || el.tagName === 'BUTTON') {\n                el.innerHTML = texts[key];\n            } else {\n                el.textContent = texts[key];\n            }\n        }\n    });\n}\n\n// 初始化\ndocument.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {\n    const lang = getPreferredLang();\n    switchLang(lang);\n});\n</script>\n{{end}}\n",

## 🤖 Assistant #92 (Agent)

_2025-12-26 06:34Z_

这些模板使用的是内联样式和脚本，不需要额外添加版本号。主要需要版本号的是 `dashboard.html`，已经处理好了。

**总结一下完成的修改：**

### 1. 新建 `config/version.go`
- 定义 `BuildTime` 和 `Version` 变量（构建时通过 `-ldflags` 注入）
- `GetStaticVersion()` 函数：生产环境返回构建时间戳，开发环境返回当前时间戳

### 2. 修改 `controllers/pages.go`
- 所有页面渲染时传递 `staticVersion` 和 `appVersion`

### 3. 修改 `templates/dashboard.html`
```html
<!-- CSS -->
<link rel="stylesheet" href="/static/css/dashboard.css?v={{.staticVersion}}">

<!-- JS -->
<script src="/static/js/utils.js?v={{.staticVersion}}"></script>
```

### 4. 修改 `Makefile`
```makefile
BUILD_TIME := $(shell date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)
LDFLAGS := -X llm-chat-history-backend/config.BuildTime=$(BUILD_TIME)
```

### 5. 修改 `Dockerfile`
- 构建时自动生成时间戳并注入

### 6. 修改 `docker-compose.yml`
- 传递 `BUILD_TIME` 构建参数

### 7. 修改 `deploy.sh`
- `start_app` 和 `update` 命令都会生成构建时间戳

**使用方式：**

```bash
# 本地构建
make build
# 输出: Building with version 1.0.0, build time 20251226120000

# Docker 部署
sudo ./deploy.sh update
# 输出: 构建时间戳: 20251226120000
```

每次构建后，静态资源 URL 会变为类似 `/static/css/dashboard.css?v=20251226120000`，浏览器会自动获取最新版本！
